VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "AI, Consumers & Psychological Harm" by Przemysław Pałka was found on SSRN (posted September 2023), matching both the title and author exactly. It is a book chapter published in the Cambridge University Press volume *AI and Consumers* (2023/2024).
LINK: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4564997
